title: Under-tooling: Large multiplication
annotation: Base model guesses ~310,000 from memory. GRPO model calls calculator and gets exact answer 309,524.
expected_base: Guesses approximate answer without using calculator

title: Over-tooling: Trivial math
annotation: Base model wastes a tool call on trivial math. GRPO model answers '4' directly without tools.

title: Multi-step chain: Population ratio
task: What's the population of France divided by the population of Belgium?
annotation: Base model guesses both populations and does wrong mental math. GRPO model chains wikipedia x2 + calculator for correct answer 5.85.
expected_base: Guesses populations, wrong mental math, incorrect answer

title: Tool chaining: Temperature conversion
task: Convert the current temperature in Tokyo from Celsius to Fahrenheit.
annotation: Base model guesses '72F'. GRPO model chains weather -> unit_converter for correct answer 64.4F.
expected_base: Guesses temperature without looking it up

title: Error recovery: Wikipedia failure
task: What is the GDP of France?
annotation: Wikipedia returns 'No results found' for first query. Base model hallucinates a number. GRPO model rephrases query and retries.
expected_base: Hallucinates GDP figure after tool error
expected_grpo: Rephrases query to 'france gross domestic product economy', gets result

title: Restraint: Common knowledge
annotation: Base model calls wikipedia unnecessarily. GRPO model answers 'William Shakespeare' directly.
expected_grpo: Answers 'William Shakespeare' directly, no tools used
